'''vanodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kackle|kackle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kackle|kackle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vanodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænedheth|vænedheth]] || [[word:vænedhej|vænedhej]] || [[word:vænedhesh|vænedhesh]] || [[word:vænedhe|vænedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanonodhoth|vanonodhoth]] || [[word:vanonodhoj|vanonodhoj]] || [[word:vanonodhosh|vanonodhosh]] || [[word:vanonodho|vanonodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanodhoth|vanodhoth]] || [[word:vanodhoj|vanodhoj]] || [[word:vanodhosh|vanodhosh]] || [[word:vanodho|vanodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanofdhoth|vanofdhoth]] || [[word:vanofdhoj|vanofdhoj]] || [[word:vanofdhosh|vanofdhosh]] || [[word:vanofdhof|vanofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanodhotho|vanodhotho]] || [[word:vanodhojo|vanodhojo]] || [[word:vanodhosho|vanodhosho]] || [[word:vanodhoko|vanodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanodhoth|vanodhoth]] || [[word:vanodhoj|vanodhoj]] || [[word:vanodhosh|vanodhosh]] || [[word:vanodho|vanodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanodhothol|vanodhothol]] || [[word:vanodhojol|vanodhojol]] || [[word:vanodhoshol|vanodhoshol]] || [[word:vanodhokol|vanodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanodhothotho|vanodhothotho]] || [[word:vanodhojojo|vanodhojojo]] || [[word:vanodhoshosho|vanodhoshosho]] || [[word:vanodhoko|vanodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanodhothon|vanodhothon]] || [[word:vanodhojon|vanodhojon]] || [[word:vanodhoshon|vanodhoshon]] || [[word:vanodhokon|vanodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanodhothoro|vanodhothoro]] || [[word:vanodhojoro|vanodhojoro]] || [[word:vanodhoshoro|vanodhoshoro]] || [[word:vanodhokoro|vanodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
